title: Rolson 43205 Gel Bicycle Seat Cover
features: Bicycle seat cover that provides cushioning and support while cycling
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring them innovative products, all at the possible margins and this year is no different. To date, they have over 250 exciting and innovative products to whet their appetite, together with a host of new in store packaging and point of sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to their existing lines. They bring product combinations that bring originality. Rolson 43205 Gel Bicycle Seat Cover The cover itself takes seconds to fit and is adaptable for many different sizes Just loosen off the cover and slip over the saddle adjust the draw strings to ensure the optimum fit. It can be used an all types of bikes even spinning and exercise trainers.
